description: International criminal gang originating in Los Angeles, California, known for extreme violence, tattoos, and a code of vengeance. Engages in drug trafficking, extortion, murder, and other crimes. Designated as a foreign terrorist organization by the U.S. State Department in 2025. Active across the Americas and Europe, with a significant decline in El Salvador after 2022.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territorio: El Salvador , Honduras , México , Nicaragua , Guatemala , Estados Unidos , Canadá , Italia , España , Portugal , Alemania , Australia , Venezuela
country_links.context: The organization has territory in Australia.

country_links.evidence_quote: Los países más afectados por la Mara Salvatrucha fueron Guatemala, Belice , El Salvador, Honduras y, en menor medida, Canadá, Estados Unidos y México.
country_links.context: Belize is among the countries most affected by the Mara Salvatrucha.

country_links.evidence_quote: Se originaron en Los Ángeles ( California ) y se expandieron a otras regiones de Estados Unidos , Canadá , México , el norte de Centroamérica ( Guatemala , El Salvador y Honduras ) y en el sur y oeste de Europa ( Italia , Portugal y España ).
country_links.context: The Mara Salvatrucha expanded into Canada and has members there.
